title: Untitled Vanilla Modpack
description: A modpack that adds stuff that should be in vanilla but have been refused
body:
This modpack aims to add vanilla+ content that should already be in vanilla, the main features of this mod include enhancements to biomes through mods such as Biomes' o plenty and dynamic trees and quality of life changes that will make your experience more enjoyable and realistic!

Untitled Vanilla Modpack is a lightweight modpack that is made to enhance your game with extra vanilla content, i made it with the intent that people will enjoy this modpack and add mods to it to tailor it to thier needs!
